observations.observation: Phase 1 scrape writes individual ad JSON files but summary shows 0 ads when video transcription errors cause analyzeAd() to return null
observations.root_cause: Video download/transcription errors wrapped in same try-catch as file writing — entire function returns null on video failure
observations.fix_applied: Isolated video handling in its own try-catch; text data (body copy, headline) still captured even when video fails

observations.observation: curious_coder/facebook-ads-library-scraper returns data in nested snapshot format — snapshot.body.text, snapshot.videos[], snapshot.cards[]
observations.root_cause: Different Apify actors have different output schemas
observations.fix_applied: Updated analyzeAd() to handle snapshot nested format with fallbacks to flat format

observations.observation: ICP parser was capturing file header '# Ideal Customer Profiles' as a 5th ICP, inflating generation count from 212 to 265
observations.root_cause: split(/^## ICP \d+:/m) returns file header as first segment
observations.fix_applied: Skip sections[0] (header) and start from sections[1]

observations.observation: Full pipeline (13 ads × 4 ICPs × 7 formats) generates 212 ad scripts + 32 content pieces = 244 total pieces in one run with zero failures
